## 🚀 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added to PowerCSharp.

## 💡 Motivation

Please explain why this feature would be useful:

- What problem does this solve?
- What use cases would this enable?
- How would this improve the developer experience?

## 📋 Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see:

### API Design

```csharp
// Proposed API example
public static class StringExtensions
{
    /// <summary>
    /// [Brief description of the method]
    /// </summary>
    /// <param name="input">[Parameter description]</param>
    /// <returns>[Return value description]</returns>
    public static string NewMethod(this string input)
    {
        // Implementation details
    }
}
```

### Implementation Details

- **Package**: [Core/Extensions/Utilities/Helpers]
- **Method/Class Name**: [Proposed name]
- **Parameters**: [List of parameters and their types]
- **Return Type**: [Return type]
- **Dependencies**: [Any external dependencies]

## 🎯 Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Method/Class is implemented according to specification
- [ ] Unit tests are provided with >80% code coverage
- [ ] XML documentation is complete
- [ ] Performance benchmarks are acceptable
- [ ] Breaking changes are documented (if any)

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered:

1. **Alternative 1**: [Description]
   - Pros: [List advantages]
   - Cons: [List disadvantages]

2. **Alternative 2**: [Description]
   - Pros: [List advantages]
   - Cons: [List disadvantages]

## 📚 Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

## 🔗 Related Issues

- Related to #issue_number
- Blocks #issue_number
- Follows up on #issue_number

## 📎 Attachments

- [ ] Mockups or designs
- [ ] Code examples
- [ ] Performance benchmarks
- [ ] Documentation drafts

We'll review your request and consider it for upcoming releases.
